message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam maxMessageSize 100

participant "VideoSink" as VideoSink
participant "VideoDecoder" as VideoDecoder
participant "VideoReceiver" as VideoReceiver
participant "RTPReceiver" as RTPReceiver
participant "Transceiver" as Transceiver
participant "DTLS" as DTLS

== Receive RTP ==

DTLS -> DTLS : AsyncUDPSocket
DTLS -> DTLS : RecvFrom\nPacketReceived
DTLS -> DTLS : read\nssl

DTLS -> DTLS : SignalReadEvent
DTLS -> Transceiver : OnReadPacket()
Transceiver -> Transceiver : ProcessConnection\nUDPPort\nPossibleIncomingPacket()

Transceiver -> Transceiver : webrtc::DtlsTransport::OnReadPacket()
Transceiver -> Transceiver : [RtpTransportInternal]\n[RtpTransport]\nDtpTransport\nOnPacket
Transceiver -> Transceiver : RtpTransport::OnReadPacket()
Transceiver -> Transceiver : SrtpTransport::OnRtpPacketReceived()

Transceiver -> RTPReceiver : RtpDemuxer\nOnRtpPacket()

== Receive Video ==

RTPReceiver -> Transceiver : OnRtpPacket()
Transceiver -> Transceiver : StreamsInterface\nWebRtcVideoStream\nWebRtcVideoChannel\nWebRtcVideoStream

Transceiver -> Transceiver : JsepIceCall\nstream()

Transceiver -> RTPReceiver : DeliverPacket()
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : OnRtpPacket()

RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : RtpVideoStreamReceiver\nOnRtpPacket()
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : ReceivePacket()
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : OnReceivedPayloadData()
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : OnReceivedVideoFrame()
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : OnDecodedFrame()
RTPReceiver -> RTPReceiver : OnCompleteFrame()

RTPReceiver -> VideoReceiver : VideoReceiveStream\nOnCompleteFrame()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver : FrameBuffer
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver : InsertFrame()

note over VideoReceiver : RESUME

VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver : HandleEncodedFrame()
VideoReceiver -> VideoReceiver : Decode()

VideoReceiver -> VideoDecoder : VCMGenericDecoder\nDecode()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : Decode()

VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : VideoDecodeDecoderFrameCallbackWrapper\nDecode()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : AndroidVideoDecoder\nDecode()

VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : VideoDecoder.Callback
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : OnDecodedFrame()

VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : VCMDecodedFrameCallback\nDecoded()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : FrameToRender()

VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : VideoStreamDecoder\nFrameToRender()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : OnFrame()

VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : IncomingVideoStream\nOnFrame()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : OnFrame()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : OnFrame()

VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : WebRtcVideoReceiveStream\nOnFrame()
VideoDecoder -> VideoDecoder : OnFrame()

VideoDecoder -> VideoSink : VideoSinkWrapper\nOnFrame()
VideoSink -> VideoSink : OnFrame()

VideoSink -> VideoSink : ProxyVideoSink\nOnFrame()
VideoSink -> VideoSink : SurfaceViewRenderer\nOnFrame()

@enduml
